title: ROAS Measurement
description: Ads v1 ROAS/CPA/AOV measurement contract based on verified revenue, not pending revenue.
$comment: Sources: PACK-07, TECH-07, and PACK-10. ROAS official reporting is blocked without Verified Revenue, Data Quality PASS, and clear attribution. TODO: exact calculation output fields are not locked by source docs.

roas.description: ROAS value represented as decimal string. TODO: define precision/rounding.

attribution_conflict_status.description: Attribution conflict status. TODO: define official conflict enum.

official_reporting_allowed.description: Whether this measurement can be used as official reporting.
